Looking beyond Questo for your next trip? Try Humbo to build bucket lists like the IMDb of travel, Polarsteps to plan, track, and relive journeys, and Atmosfy for local video feeds that reveal what’s trending in 10K+ cities.

results.title: Copilot2trip Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
#### What needs improvement

interactive maps (1)

Report

 20 views

•1 review

Great app, responded to a question instantly. Moreover can come up with an itinerary for less popular places too. Tried a couple of cities of Uzbekistan. As a local can say that whatever was on offer was valid. Only questions is, how does it pick out places to eat? Can a restaurant for example advertise its place and hence get mentioned in the itinerary. All in all reall cool 👍🏻

#### What's great

fast itinerary generation (3)restaurant suggestions (1)tailored itineraries (3)

Report

 1 view

•1 review [...] Apparently no one told the model it had interactive maps. "Copilot2trip is your free AI co-pilot, creating tailored travel plans with interactive maps." When asked about this feature: "I apologize for any confusion caused. As a text-based AI, I don't have the capability to provide interactive maps directly in this chat interface. I can still assist you with travel recommendations, information, and answer any questions you may have. If you need assistance with specific locations or directions, I can provide text-based guidance. If you prefer to use interactive maps, I recommend using popular mapping platforms like Google Maps or Apple Maps, which offer detailed and interactive maps for your travel needs." Ran same queries in ChatGPT 3.5 and got nearly identical replies. Most were a bit [...] Based on 14 reviews

Review Copilot2trip?

Reviewers see Copilot2trip as a useful idea for fast trip planning, with several saying it gives solid suggestions, responds quickly, and can build workable itineraries even for less common destinations. But the praise is uneven. Multiple users question whether key features really work as expected, especially interactive maps, real-time planning, travel times, and restaurant quality. The sharpest criticism is about support and account management: some users say paid access stopped working, invoices were missing, and they could not find settings, contact details, or any way to get help.
